title: blanket
description: Blanket is a vanilla+ pack built with performance and adventures in mind. It is recommended that you use Arboria in your worlds to enhance the experience.
body:
Blanket is a fabric pack with an emphasis on exploration and optimization similar to vanilla+. ***I will attempt to keep it up to date but may not be able to.***

**This pack was made in Prism Launcher. It is fully compatible with my Mac Mojave so it should run fine on most devices.**

Blanket is based partially on Additive and Simply Optimized but has some more mods that enhance the experience, such as Tectonic with it’s underground lava rivers. It also features many of Serilum’s QoL Vanilla Experience mods , for example Recast or Fish on the Line.


Arboria:https://modrinth.com/datapack/arboria
